description: First monthly report for Meadow Lane Dental after their Growth-tier engagement started 2026-05-02. Report covers period 2026-05-02 to 2026-05-31. Client tenure ~30 days (just over threshold). Agent should produce a clean first-month report with deliverables mapped to commitments, early KPI movement, and honest framing of baseline-establishment phase.
hubspot_metrics: Enquiries (from ads + organic): 78 (baseline was 80 for April). Booked consultations: 34 (baseline 26). Enquiry→consultation conversion: 43.6% (baseline 32.5%). Deal value booked: £14,200 (baseline £9,800).
ga4_metrics: Sessions: 4,241 (up from 3,986). Long-form page views (first piece published 2026-05-22): 412. Average time on long-form page: 3:42. Contact page conversions: 52 (baseline 48).
stripe_metrics: Not configured for this tenant (dental practice, not SaaS).
